nasb.text: The Lord has opened His armory And has brought forth the weapons of His indignation, For it is a work of the Lord God of hosts In the land of the Chaldeans.

esv.text: The Lord has opened his armory and brought out the weapons of his wrath, for the Lord God of hosts has a work to do in the land of the Chaldeans.

cnv.text: 耶和華打開了自己的軍械庫， 拿出他忿怒的武器； 因為主萬軍之耶和華 在迦勒底人的地有事要作。

ccb.text: 耶和华已打开祂的军库， 取出倾泻祂愤怒的兵器。 因为主——万军之耶和华要惩罚迦勒底人。
